name: Input
description: Input component - composable text fields for single-line, multi-row, textarea, select, command, and tag variants.

documentation.purpose: The Input component is used to create various Inputs. Input defaults to the Content instance, which can be replaced with other instances.
guidance: Buttons - Sign in with Apple, form button bar, saved toast.
Input states - 1 row, title vertical, textarea, textarea counter, title + input, and select across seven states.
Radio, checkbox, and switch controls with default, hover, and disabled variants.
Error messages display below fields and push content down.
features: Type - 1 row, 2row vertical, 2 row horizontal, Textarea.
State - Default, Hover, Focus, No interaction.
documentation.correlation: Instances within the Input are replaceable with any instance except itself.
examples: Because form elements such as Input and select fields often have the same style, it's easier to maintain them all using the Input component.
Any element that can Input text can be done with the input component.
